name: BLUE ENERGY LIMITED
summary: Blue Energy Limited, an oil and gas exploration company, undertakes exploration, evaluation, and development of conventional and unconventional oil and gas resources primarily in Queensland and the Northern Territory in Australia. It holds 2P reserves of 71 PJ; 3P reserves of 298 PJ; and 3P + 2C reserves of 1,464 PJ. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Brisbane, Australia.
